tasks.title: [TDD: inline] Strengthen provider prompt-ref regression coverage for `scripts/sync-global.sh`: prove `--fix` writes single-file refs, `--check` rejects legacy multi-file refs/stale concatenated prompts, runtime canary warns/continues when `opencode` is unavailable, and prompt-only provider config does not activate provider mode. If existing tests already cover a criterion, tighten assertions instead of duplicating coverage.
tasks.implementation_summary: Updated `plugin/src/overlay-sync-assets.test.ts` with runtime canary unavailable coverage. Verified `pnpm exec vitest run src/overlay-sync-assets.test.ts` and `pnpm exec vitest run src/sync-global.test.ts src/overlay-sync-assets.test.ts`. Checkpoint commit 392922d48571deeadb38347d9c2ef5e444f9c0d6.

error_recovery.last_error: Initial red command failed before dependencies were installed in the new worktree; installed dependencies and reran focused tests. A first test version over-pruned PATH and hid `python`, producing exit 127; corrected PATH filtering to remove only `.opencode` while preserving toolchain shims.

attempts.error: Focused test failed with status 127 because PATH excluded `python` while simulating missing `opencode`.
attempts.diagnosis: Test setup over-constrained PATH; intended simulation only needed to remove the `.opencode` binary path.
attempts.fix_tried: Filter `.opencode` entries from existing PATH instead of replacing PATH with `/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin`.

tasks.completed_by: Completed. Added integration regression test proving `sync-global.sh --check` warns and continues when `opencode` is absent from PATH after provider prompt refs/parts were generated by `--fix`. Focused sync tests pass.

tasks.title: [TDD: not_applicable] Repair direct provider-ADV prompt-ref documentation drift only where found: provider assembly docs, smoke checklist, generated spec docs/spec JSON if a law gap exists, and adjacent developer docs only when they directly contradict the single-file prompt-ref model. Include the validator's optional clarity note near `check_provider_prompt_parts()` only if code inspection confirms the comment improves maintainability.

tdd_reclassification.reason: Task is documentation/comment drift repair; prep task title explicitly marked `[TDD: not_applicable]`. User approved prep plan containing this task.
tdd_reclassification.approval_evidence: User replied `approve` to prep vision listing this task in the approved task graph.

tasks.implementation_summary: Changed `docs/provider-agent-assembly.md`, `docs/provider-adv-smoke-checklist.md`, and `scripts/sync-global.sh`. Verified `pnpm exec vitest run src/sync-global.test.ts src/overlay-sync-assets.test.ts`. Checkpoint commit 3ad61bcdb366f14d3f0229765a2bc32e240e2cb3.
tasks.completed_by: Completed. TDD not applicable (documentation/comment clarity). Updated provider docs and smoke checklist to state runtime canary skip continues static validation. Added maintainer comment explaining why prompt-part freshness checks are gated on provider prompt refs being configured. Focused provider sync tests pass.

tasks.title: [TDD: separate_verification] Run final focused and stack verification for provider ADV prompt assembly: focused sync tests (`pnpm test -- src/sync-global.test.ts src/overlay-sync-assets.test.ts`), `pnpm run check`, and broader test/build verification if focused changes or failures require it. Record exact commands and outcomes.

tdd_reclassification.reason: Task is final cross-cutting verification, explicitly titled `[TDD: separate_verification]`. User approved prep plan containing this task.
tdd_reclassification.approval_evidence: User replied `approve` to prep vision listing this task in the approved task graph.

tasks.implementation_summary: Final verification/remediation: added `--check` stale concatenated provider prompt integration test, removed unused `single_ref` local, and verified `pnpm exec vitest run src/sync-global.test.ts src/overlay-sync-assets.test.ts` (85 tests), `pnpm run check`, and `pnpm run build`. Final clean HEAD 4a149efa077ab50f89c93401498e92d06399e9be.

error_recovery.last_error: adv_task_checkpoint git commits succeeded for review remediation, but ledger recording failed with WorkflowUpdateFailedError. Worktree is clean; task notes record final commit SHAs.

attempts.error: adv_run_test returned WorkflowUpdateFailedError for `pnpm run check`.
attempts.diagnosis: ADV evidence recording failed, not the verification command itself.
attempts.fix_tried: Ran `pnpm run check` and `pnpm run build` via bash and recorded fallback green evidence with adv_task_evidence.

attempts.error: adv_task_checkpoint committed review remediation but ledger recording failed with WorkflowUpdateFailedError.
attempts.diagnosis: Git state is correct; ADV task-run ledger failed to record post-completion remediation checkpoint.
attempts.fix_tried: Retried checkpoint on clean HEAD and recorded final commit information in task notes.

tasks.completed_by: Updated after review remediation. Added stale concatenated prompt check coverage and removed unused `single_ref`; verification passes. Note: checkpoint commits 21df5fd and 4a149ef succeeded but task-run ledger recording reported WorkflowUpdateFailedError; worktree is clean and final HEAD is 4a149efa077ab50f89c93401498e92d06399e9be.

wisdom.content: In ADV worktrees, `plugin/node_modules` may be absent even when main checkout has dependencies; run `pnpm install` in the worktree before task tests. When simulating missing `opencode`, filter only `.opencode` PATH entries so `python`/toolchain shims remain available.

proposal.notes: Problem statement and initial scope confirmed by user (`continue`). Proposal written with success criteria, scope, affected code, constraints, impact, context, discovery agenda, and clean B/F/S scan.

discovery.notes: Agreement persisted after user approved acceptance criteria. Discovery findings recorded in proposal. User decisions: adjacent docs allowed for direct contradictions; runtime canary warns/continues when opencode unavailable; spec delta only if gap found.

design.notes: Design recorded. Mandatory independent validator returned VALIDATED. No user-value tradeoff, unresolved conflict, or contract-compromise risk identified; proceeding to prep per design command contract.

planning.notes: Prep plan approved by user. Task graph has 3 tasks: regression coverage, documentation drift repair, final verification. No user-value judgment calls identified for Phase J; choices are technical and constrained by spec/design.

execution.notes: All three execution tasks completed with checkpoint evidence. Focused provider sync tests, pnpm run check, and pnpm run build pass. Worktree clean.

acceptance.notes: User accepted delivered work after APPROVED review. Review findings fixed/rejected with evidence; verification passed.

release.notes: User gave Tier B archive sign-off (`sign off`). Harden status READY; verification passed; conformance state has no required specs.
